heading: Prohibition against certain false statements
label: 300ee–19 Prohibition against certain false statements
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2509 of act , was successively renumbered by subsequent acts, see .July 1, 1944section 238h of this title

children.text: A person may not knowingly make or cause to be made any false statement or representation of a material fact in connection with the furnishing of items or services for which amounts may be paid by a State from payments received by the State under .section 300ee–11(a) of this title

A person with knowledge of the occurrence of any event affecting the right of the person to receive any amounts from payments made to the State under may not conceal or fail to disclose any such event with the intent of fraudulently securing such amounts.section 300ee–11(a) of this title

children.heading: Criminal penalty for violation of prohibition
children.label: b Criminal penalty for violation of prohibition
children.text: Any person who violates a prohibition established in subsection (a) may for each violation be fined in accordance with title 18, or imprisoned for not more than 5 years, or both.
